title: Build a GUI Dungeon Crawler
description: Build a graphical dungeon crawler with tkinter where players explore a tile-based map, collect items, and fight enemies. Combines OOP design with tkinter Canvas, threading for game loop, and shelve for save games.
final_description: A complete GUI dungeon crawler with a tile-based map rendered on tkinter Canvas, player movement with keyboard input, fog of war, item pickups, enemy AI with pathfinding, turn-based combat UI, inventory panel, shelve-based save/load, and threaded game loop — built across 10 chapters.
